ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for conference inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference where the session is held */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Symposium, Forum) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the session chair (e.g., Chair (Primary), Moderator (Primary)) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the session is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the session */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if registration is required for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session where the presentation is held */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the presentation */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the presentation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the presentation */,
  "presentation_type" TEXT /* Type of presentation (e.g., oral, poster) */,
  "presentation_status" TEXT /* Status of the presentation (e.g., proposed, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the speaker */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Text describing the speaker's research interests */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's LinkedIn profile */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_presentations" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the presentation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker in the presentation (e.g., primary, co-presenter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id", "presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., excavation, survey, cultural resource management) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., grant, private funding) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the dataset belongs */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, SQL, JSON) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the dataset (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conference organizer, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who registered */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendee registered */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session registration */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attendee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendee registered for the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)
